entries.title: datafabric.qem expression fails in case spawn inputs
entries.symptom: A case spawn whose JobArguments use a =datafabric.qem: query expression fails at runtime instead of fanning out.
entries.cause: =datafabric.qem: query expressions are not evaluated in case-spawn JobArguments; they raise a runtime syntax error rather than resolving to data.
entries.fix: Pass a literal stakeholder slug instead (e.g. StakeholderId: "gamma"). Do not attempt data-driven fan-out via qem in spawn inputs; resolve the values at authoring time.

entries.title: Stale caseplan.json.bpmn runs old logic; only the canvas recompiles it
entries.symptom: Edits to caseplan.json have no runtime effect; the case keeps running old logic with no error.
entries.cause: The engine executes the compiled caseplan.json.bpmn, not caseplan.json. Only opening and saving the case in the Studio Web canvas regenerates the .bpmn; CLI upload/pack do not recompile it.
entries.fix: After any caseplan edit: open the case in the canvas, run uip solution download --extract, commit the regenerated .bpmn, then pack/deploy. Detect staleness by comparing mtimes (caseplan.json newer than .bpmn = stale).

entries.title: Completed case instance leaves its Orchestrator job Running
entries.surface: Orchestrator jobs vs Maestro Case instances
entries.symptom: A case instance shows Completed but its backing Orchestrator job stays Running for hours or days, breaking job-based completion polling.
entries.cause: Completed Maestro Case instances do not flip their backing job to Successful (only Cancelled instances flip the job, to Stopped). The two views are not reconciled.
entries.fix: Treat case instances as the source of truth: verify completion with uip maestro case instance get/list, not the Jobs view. Sweep zombie Running jobs separately.

entries.title: Data Fabric rejects a field named id
entries.symptom: Creating an entity with a field named id is rejected.
entries.cause: id collides with the system Id UUID primary key.
entries.fix: Use an alternate name such as slug instead of id for your business key.

entries.title: Underscore field names are silently dropped on insert
entries.symptom: Field names containing underscores (provider_id, display_name) are accepted by the schema and the insert reports success, but the values never persist. No error is surfaced.
entries.cause: uip df records insert silently drops fields whose names contain underscores; only the live-layer camelCase form persists.
entries.fix: camelCase every field name on insert (provider_id -> providerId, display_name -> displayName). Keep snake_case only in schema docs, never in the inserted payload.

entries.title: records insert needs the entity GUID, not its name
entries.symptom: Passing an entity name to records insert is rejected.
entries.cause: uip df records insert expects the entity GUID returned by entities create/list, not the human-readable entity name.
entries.fix: Run uip df entities list first, build a name->GUID map, and pass the GUID to every insert.

entries.title: Deleting a pending HITL gate faults the case (160009)
entries.symptom: Deleting (instead of actioning) a pending gate task faults the backing case instance.
entries.cause: A deleted gate task is recorded as a user-caused incident (ErrorCode 160009, IncidentType User) pinned to the gate element; the case transitions to Faulted.
entries.fix: Always ACTION gate tasks (Approve/Deny, File/Withdraw) — never delete them. Add a confirmation/guard in any operator UI that exposes delete.

entries.title: AppTask completion returns 405 on the obvious endpoints
entries.symptom: Completing an AppTask via the obvious OData/form endpoints returns 405 Method Not Allowed.
entries.cause: The documented OData Complete action and form endpoints do not complete AppTasks; the correct route was undocumented.
entries.fix: Use POST /tasks/AppTasks/CompleteAppTask (the route behind uip tasks complete --type AppTask). Assign the task first; unassigned tasks fail.

entries.title: AppTask completion fails when the task is unassigned
entries.symptom: Completing an AppTask that is not assigned to the caller fails.
error_signatures: This action is no longer assigned to you
entries.cause: AppTask completion requires the task to be assigned to the acting identity first.
entries.fix: Assign the task before completing it (uip tasks assign <id> --user <email>), then complete.

entries.title: AppTasks on a stopped case are orphaned and uncompletable
entries.symptom: An AppTask whose backing case instance was stopped or swept cannot be completed.
error_signatures: This action has been already deleted
entries.cause: Stopping or sweeping the backing case instance orphans its AppTasks; they are dead in both CLI and the Action Center UI.
entries.fix: Complete AppTasks before stopping or sweeping their backing jobs. For a demo, action all gates within the janitor window before any sweep, or start a fresh run.

entries.title: uip codedapp deploy hangs forever with -v/--path-name
entries.symptom: Deploying a coded app with explicit -v/--path-name hangs indefinitely on an indexing status check and never returns.
entries.cause: The explicit-version deploy path triggers a broken indexing status-check that never completes.
entries.fix: Use the bare form: uip codedapp deploy -n <name> --folder-key <key>. It reads app.config.json and upgrades in place. Confirm via stdout 'App upgraded successfully' + HTTP 200, not the local config file.

entries.title: solution pack regenerates entry-point IDs and breaks upgrades
entries.symptom: Upgrading an existing deployment fails because the solution tries to preserve old entry-point IDs that no longer exist.
error_signatures: was not found in package version
entries.cause: uip solution pack regenerates entry-point IDs on every repack, so an in-place upgrade cannot match the previously deployed IDs.
entries.fix: Build a mixed-version package: keep already-deployed Agent-type processes at their stable version and bump only non-Agent projects, swapping payloads and bumping packageVersion + a fresh packageVersionKey.

entries.title: Context Grounding silently skips .md files
entries.symptom: Ingesting a Markdown corpus reports Successful, but searches return zero hits.
entries.cause: Markdown is not a supported ingestion format; .md files are skipped silently while the job still reports success.
entries.fix: Convert the corpus to .txt (or .pdf/.docx) before ingestion, and verify retrieval returns hits after seeding.

entries.title: uip case / uip flow / uip bpmn are not valid — use the maestro namespace
entries.symptom: Running a top-level uip case / uip flow / uip bpmn command fails with an unknown-command error.
entries.cause: Maestro CLI verbs live under the maestro namespace; there is no top-level uip case/flow/bpmn command. UiPath's own official skills carried this exact bug (issues #333/#337) before fixing it.
entries.fix: Prefix the verb with maestro: use 'uip maestro case ...', 'uip maestro flow ...', and 'uip maestro bpmn ...'. Run 'maestro-case check-cli <path>' to catch bare invocations in scripts and docs.
